Notice Of Motion And Motion To Mediate In Lieu Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-08-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiffs Patricia Danielson, Mary-Anne Emmo's Motion to Mediate in Lieu of Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is removed from Judicial Arbitration. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered case set for Jury Trial on 9/10/2012 at 9:30 AM, in Department 610. A Mediation Enforcement Order to Show Cause is scheduled on 6/27/2012 at 2:00 PM, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
